title: Start Smp
description: Add /startsmp command for expanding the worldborder automatically.
body:
![Command](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba54e6816db8d66e6ba5c971c7f1196aba15dca7.png)
# About
It add a simple /startsmp command that does countdown for 10 seconds then sets the world to 1000 blocks.
# Versions
1.20 and above, It should not need an update for future versions
# Permissions
You will need OP or startsmp.use to execute this command.
